metric_notes.paired_run_density: fraction of positions with paired probability >= threshold
metric_notes.local_41nt_paired_mean: maximum sliding-window mean paired probability over 41 nt
metric_notes.local_81nt_paired_mean: maximum sliding-window mean paired probability over 81 nt
metric_notes.reverse_complement_kmer_pair_density: fraction of 4-mers whose RNA reverse complement also appears in the same best window
metric_notes.AU_rich_paired_density: fraction of 7-mers with AU fraction >= 6/7 and mean paired probability >= threshold
metric_notes.U_rich_paired_density: fraction of 7-mers with U fraction >= 5/7 and mean paired probability >= threshold
